package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "sync"
)

// Negative scenario for goroutine_derived_context_unmanaged: shows the preferred shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: Likely long-lived goroutines launched after a derived context is created and before the matching cancel call is observed.
func NegativeGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanaged(ctx context.Context, items []int) map[int]int {
    out := make(map[int]int, len(items))
    var mu sync.Mutex
    var wg sync.WaitGroup
    for _, item := range items {
        item := item
        wg.Add(1)
        go func() {
            defer wg.Done()
            select {
            case <-ctx.Done():
                return
            default:
                mu.Lock(); out[item] = item * 2; mu.Unlock()
            }
        }()
    }
    wg.Wait()
    return out
}
